(ISO 8601, or relative like 30d, 12w)\n175\t        #[arg(long)]\n176\t        since: Option<String>,\n177\t\n178\t        /// Minimum occurrence count to report (default: 3)\n179\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"3\")]\n180\t        threshold: usize,\n181\t\n182\t        /// JSON output\n183\t        #[arg(long)]\n184\t        json: bool,\n185\t    },\n186\t    /// Manage the background daemon\n187\t    Daemon {\n188\t        #[command(subcommand)]\n189\t        action: DaemonAction,\n190\t    },\n191\t    /// Distill session patterns into agent-specific rules files\n192\t    Rules {\n193\t        /// Project path to extract rules for\n194\t        project_path: PathBuf,\n195\t\n196\t        /// Output format: claude, cursor, or aider\n197\t        #[arg(long, value_enum, default_value = \"claude\")]\n198\t        format: String,\n199\t\n200\t        /// JSON output (print rules without writing file)\n201\t        #[arg(long)]\n202\t        json: bool,\n203\t    },\n204\t    /// Cross-agent performance comparison and analytics\n205\t    Analytics {\n206\t        /// Filter by agent name\n207\t        #[arg(short, long)]\n208\t        agent: Option<String>,\n209\t\n210\t        /// Filter by project path\n211\t        #[arg(short, long)]\n212\t        project: Option<String>,\n213\t\n214\t        /// Only include sessions after this date (ISO 8601, or relative like 30d, 12w)\n215\t        #[arg(long)]\n216\t        since: Option<String>,\n217\t\n218\t        /// JSON structured output\n219\t        #[arg(long)]\n220\t        json: bool,\n221\t    },\n222\t    /// Garbage collect old session files and index entries\n223\t    Gc {\n224\t        /// Delete sessions older than this duration (e.g., 30d, 12w, 6mo)\n225\t        /// Default: value from config.toml scrape.max_session_age_days\n226\t        #[arg(long)]\n227\t        older_than: Option<String>,\n228\t\n229\t        /// Show what would be deleted without acting\n230\t        #[arg(long)]\n231\t        dry_run: bool,\n232\t\n233\t        /// JSON output\n234\t        #[arg(long)]\n235\t        json: bool,\n236\t    },\n237\t    /// Bidirectional git commit ↔ session linking\n238\t    Blame {\n239\t        /// File path with optional line number (e.g., src/auth.rs or src/auth.rs:42)\n240\t        spec: String,\n241\t\n242\t        /// Maximum number of results (default: 10)\n243\t        #[arg(short = 'n', long, default_value = \"10\")]\n244\t        max_results: usize,\n245\t\n246\t        /// JSON output\n247\t        #[arg(long)]\n248\t        json: bool,\n249\t    },\n250\t    /// Show all sessions that touched a file (chronological)\n251\t    File {\n252\t        /// File path or glob pattern (e.g., src/auth.rs or \"src/auth/**\")\n253\t        path: String,\n254\t\n255\t        /// Maximum number of results (default: 50)\n256\t        #[arg(short = 'n', long, default_value = \"50\")]\n257\t        max_results: usize,\n258\t\n259\t        /// JSON output\n260\t        #[arg(long)]\n261\t        json: bool,\n262\t    },\n263\t    /// Generate Markdown summaries for sessions\n264\t    Summarize {\n265\t        /// Show summary for a specific session ID\n266\t        #[arg(long)]\n267\t        session: Option<String>,\n268\t\n269\t        /// Only include sessions after this timestamp (ISO 8601, or relative like 7d)\n270\t        #[arg(long)]\n271\t        since: Option<String>,\n272\t\n273\t        /// Filter by project path\n274\t        #[arg(long)]\n275\t        project: Option<String>,\n276\t\n277\t        /// Maximum number of sessions to summarize (default: 20)\n278\t        #[arg(short = 'n', long, default_value = \"20\")]\n279\t        max_results: usize,\n280\t\n281\t        /// Write summaries to .md files alongside session JSONL files\n282\t        #[arg(long)]\n283\t        write: bool,\n284\t\n285\t        /// JSON output\n286\t        #[arg(long)]\n287\t        json: bool,\n288\t    },\n289\t    /// Generate shell integration snippet for auto-querying on error\n290\t    ShellHook {\n291\t        /// Shell to generate snippet for (bash, zsh, fish)\n292\t        shell: String,\n293\t    },\n294\t    /// Show known gotchas, error patterns, and statistics for a file\n295\t    FileKnowledge {\n296\t        /// File path to analyze\n297\t        file_path: String,\n298\t\n299\t        /// JSON output\n300\t        #[arg(long)]\n301\t        json: bool,\n302\t    },\n303\t    /// Generate an activity digest summary\n304\t    Digest {\n305\t        /// Only include sessions after this timestamp (ISO 8601, or relative like 7d, 30d)\n306\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"7d\")]\n307\t        since: String,\n308\t\n309\t        /// Write output to file instead of stdout\n310\t        #[arg(short, long)]\n311\t        output: Option<String>,\n312\t\n313\t        /// JSON structured output\n314\t        #[arg(long)]\n315\t        json: bool,\n316\t    },\n317\t    /// Generate a quarterly Pulse Report (State of AI Coding)\n318\t    PulseReport {\n319\t        /// Quarter to report on: YYYY-Q1 through YYYY-Q4, or \"current\" (default: current)\n320\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"current\")]\n321\t        quarter: String,\n322\t\n323\t        /// Write output to file instead of stdout\n324\t        #[arg(short, long)]\n325\t        output: Option<String>,\n326\t\n327\t        /// Output format: markdown (default), html, or json\n328\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"markdown\")]\n329\t        format: String,\n330\t    },\n331\t    /// Show per-account Claude Code utilization (5h and 7d rolling windows)\n332\t    Capacity {\n333\t        /// Claude config directories to scan, one per account (default: ~/.claude + auto-discovered ~/.claude-* dirs)\n334\t        #[arg(long)]\n335\t        account_dir: Vec<PathBuf>,\n336\t\n337\t        /// Maximum age of cached usage data in seconds before falling back to JSONL (default: 600)\n338\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"600\")]\n339\t        cache_max_age: u64,\n340\t\n341\t        /// JSON output\n342\t        #[arg(long)]\n343\t        json: bool,\n344\t    },\n345\t    /// Generate shell completion script\n346\t    Completions {\n347\t        /// Shell to generate completions for\n348\t        shell: Shell,\n349\t    },\n350\t    /// Transcribe an audio file using the configured local Whisper model\n351\t    Transcribe {\n352\t        /// Audio file to transcribe (wav, mp3, or m4a)\n353\t        input: PathBuf,\n354\t\n355\t        /// Wait for the job to complete and print the transcript (default: true)\n356\t        #[arg(long, default_value_t = true)]\n357\t        wait: bool,\n358\t\n359\t        /// Maximum seconds to wait for completion (default: 600)\n360\t        #[arg(long, default_value_t = 600)]\n361\t        timeout: u64,\n362\t\n363\t        /// JSON output (includes timestamps and metadata)\n364\t        #[arg(long)]\n365\t        json: bool,\n366\t    },\n367\t    /// Pre-task priming query for agent workers\n368\t    Context {\n369\t        /// Task description to query for context\n370\t        query: String,\n371\t\n372\t        /// Token budget for context packing (default: 3000)\n373\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"3000\")]\n374\t        token_budget: usize,\n375\t\n376\t        /// Scope rules extraction to this project path\n377\t        #[arg(long)]\n378\t        project: Option<PathBuf>,\n379\t\n380\t        /// JSON output (wrap sections in JSON object)\n381\t        #[arg(long)]\n382\t        json: bool,\n383\t    },\n384\t}\n385\t\n386\t/// Config subcommands\n387\t#[derive(Subcommand, Debug)]\n388\tenum ConfigAction {\n389\t    /// Initialize global config and data directory\n390\t    Init {\n391\t        /// Force reinitialization\n392\t        #[arg(long)]\n393\t        force: bool,\n394\t    },\n395\t    /// Show current configuration\n396\t    Show,\n397\t    /// Set a configuration value\n398\t    Set {\n399\t        /// Configuration key (e.g., general.log_level)\n400\t        key: String,\n401\t        /// Configuration value\n402\t        value: String,\n403\t    },\n404\t    /// Get a configuration value\n405\t    Get {\n406\t        /// Configuration key\n407\t        key: String,\n408\t    },\n409\t}\n410\t\n411\t/// Plugins subcommands\n412\t#[derive(Subcommand, Debug)]\n413\tenum PluginsAction {\n414\t    /// List available plugins\n415\t    List {\n416\t        /// Show detailed information\n417\t        #[arg(long)]\n418\t        verbose: bool,\n419\t    },\n420\t    /// Validate a plugin definition\n421\t    Validate {\n422\t        /// Path to plugin file\n423\t        path: PathBuf,\n424\t    },\n425\t    /// Show plugin details\n426\t    Show {\n427\t        /// Plugin name\n428\t        name: String,\n429\t    },\n430\t}\n431\t\n432\t/// Daemon subcommands\n433\t#[derive(Subcommand, Debug)]\n434\tenum IndexAction {\n435\t    /// Drop and rebuild the index from session files\n436\t    Rebuild {\n437\t        /// Only re-index sessions from this plugin\n438\t        #[arg(short, long)]\n439\t        plugin: Option<String>,\n440\t\n441\t        /// Tantivy writer heap size in MB\n442\t        #[arg(long, default_value = \"50\")]\n443\t        heap_size: usize,\n444\t    },\n445\t    /// Show index statistics\n446\t    Stats,\n447\t    /// Merge segments for better query performance\n448\t    Optimize,\n449\t}\n450\t\n451\t/// Daemon subcommands\n452\t#[derive(Subcommand, Debug)]\n453\tenum DaemonAction {\n454\t    /// Start the daemon in the background\n455\t    Start,\n456\t    /// Run the daemon in the foreground (for systemd)\n457\t    Run,\n458\t    /// Stop a running daemon\n459\t    Stop,\n460\t    /// Show daemon status (PID, uptime, RSS, activity)\n461\t    Status {\n462\t        /// JSON output\n463\t        #[arg(long)]\n464\t        json: bool,\n465\t    },\n466\t    /// Tail the daemon log\n467\t    Logs {\n468\t        /// Follow mode (like tail -f)\n469\t        #[arg(short = 'f', long)]\n470\t        follow: bool,\n471\t\n472\t        /// Number of lines to show (default: 20)\n473\t        #[arg(short = 'n', long, default_value = \"20\")]\n474\t        lines: usize,\n475\t    },\n476\t    /// Install systemd user service unit (~/.config/systemd/user/agentscribe.service)\n477\t    Install,\n478\t    /// Remove systemd user service unit\n479\t    Uninstall,\n480\t}\n481\t\n482\t/// Table row for plugin list output\n483\t#[derive(Tabled)]\n484\tstruct PluginRow {\n485\t    name: String,\n486\t    version: String,\n487\t    format: String,\n488\t}\n489\t\n490\t/// Run the CLI\n491\tpub fn run() -> Result<()> {\n492\t    let args = Args::parse();\n493\t\n494\t    match args.command {\n495\t        Commands::Config { action } => run_config(action),\n496\t        Commands::Plugins { action } => run_plugins(action),\n497\t        Commands::Scrape {\n498\t            plugin,\n499\t            file,\n500\t            dry_run,\n501\t            output_events,\n502\t            json,\n503\t        } => run_scrape(plugin, file, dry_run, output_events, json),\n504\t        Commands::Status { json, plugin } => run_status(json, plugin),\n505\t        Commands::Index { action } => run_index(action),\n506\t        Commands::Search {\n507\t            query,\n508\t            error,\n509\t            code,\n510\t            lang,\n511\t            solution_only,\n512\t            like,\n513\t            session,\n514\t            agent,\n515\t            project,\n516\t            since,\n517\t            before,\n518\t            tag,\n519\t            outcome,\n520\t            r#type,\n521\t            model,\n522\t            fuzzy,\n523\t            edit_distance,\n524\t            max_results,\n525\t            snippet_length,\n526\t            token_budget,\n527\t            offset,\n528\t            sort,\n529\t            hint,\n530\t            json,\n531\t        } => run_search(\n532\t            query,\n533\t            error,\n534\t            code,\n535\t            lang,\n536\t            solution_only,\n537\t            like,\n538\t            session,\n539\t            agent,\n540\t            project,\n541\t            since,\n542\t            before,\n543\t            tag,\n544\t            outcome,\n545\t            r#type,\n546\t            model,\n547\t            fuzzy,\n548\t            edit_distance,\n549\t            max_results,\n550\t            snippet_length,\n551\t            token_budget,\n552\t            offset,\n553\t            sort,\n554\t            hint,\n555\t            json,\n556\t        ),\n557\t        Commands::Recurring {\n558\t            since,\n559\t            threshold,\n560\t            json,\n561\t        } => run_recurring(since, threshold, json),\n562\t        Commands::Daemon { action } => run_daemon(action),\n563\t        Commands::Rules {\n564\t            project_path,\n565\t            format,\n566\t            json,\n567\t        } => run_rules(project_path, format, json),\n568\t        Commands::Analytics {\n569\t            agent,\n570\t            project,\n571\t            since,\n572\t            json,\n573\t        } => run_analytics(agent, project, since, json),\n574\t        Commands::Gc {\n575\t            older_than,\n576\t            dry_run,\n577\t            json,\n578\t        } => run_gc(older_than, dry_run, json),\n579\t        Commands::Blame {\n580\t            spec,\n581\t            max_results,\n582\t            json,\n583\t        } => run_blame(spec, max_results, json),\n584\t        Commands::File {\n585\t            path,\n586\t            max_results,\n587\t            json,\n588\t        } => run_file(path, max_results, json),\n589\t        Commands::Summarize {\n590\t            session,\n591\t            since,\n592\t            project,\n593\t            max_results,\n594\t            write,\n595\t            json,\n596\t        } => run_summarize(session, since, project, max_results, write, json),\n597\t        Commands::ShellHook { shell } => run_shell_hook(&shell),\n598\t        Commands::FileKnowledge { file_path, json } => run_file_knowledge(&file_path, json),\n599\t        Commands::Digest {\n600\t            since,\n601\t            output,\n602\t            json,\n603\t        } => run_digest(since, output, json),\n604\t        Commands::PulseReport {\n605\t            quarter,\n606\t            output,\n607\t            format,\n608\t        } => run_pulse_report(quarter, output, format),\n609\t        Commands::Capacity {\n610\t            account_dir,\n611\t            cache_max_age,\n612\t            json,\n613\t        } => run_capacity(account_dir, cache_max_age, json),\n614\t        Commands::Transcribe {\n615\t            input,\n616\t            wait,\n617\t            timeout,\n618\t            json,\n619\t        } => run_transcribe(input, wait, timeout, json),\n620\t        Commands::Context {\n621\t            query,\n622\t            token_budget,\n623\t            project,\n624\t            json,\n625\t        } => run_context(query, token_budget, project, json),\n626\t        Commands::Completions { shell } => {\n627\t            let mut cmd = Args::command();\n628\t            generate(shell, &mut cmd, \"agentscribe\", &mut io::stdout());\n629\t            Ok(())\n630\t        }\n631\t    }\n632\t}\n633\t\n634\t/// Run daemon commands\n635\tfn run_daemon(action: DaemonAction) -> Result<()> {\n636\t    // install/uninstall don't need the data directory to exist\n637\t    match action {\n638\t        DaemonAction::Install => return crate::daemon::install_service(),\n639\t        DaemonAction::Uninstall => return crate::daemon::uninstall_service(),\n640\t        _ => {}\n641\t    }\n642\t\n643\t    let config = load_config()?;\n644\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n645\t\n646\t    // Ensure data directory exists for all other daemon commands\n647\t    if !data_dir.exists() {\n648\t        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n649\t        std::process::exit(1);\n650\t    }\n651\t\n652\t    match action {\n653\t        DaemonAction::Start => {\n654\t            crate::daemon::start(&data_dir)?;\n655\t            Ok(())\n656\t        }\n657\t        DaemonAction::Run => crate::daemon::run(&data_dir),\n658\t        DaemonAction::Stop => crate::daemon::stop(&data_dir),\n659\t        DaemonAction::Status { json } => {\n660\t            let info = crate::daemon::status(&data_dir)?;\n661\t            if json {\n662\t                println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&info).unwrap());\n663\t            } else {\n664\t                print_daemon_status(&info);\n665\t            }\n666\t            Ok(())\n667\t        }\n668\t        DaemonAction::Logs { follow, lines } => crate::daemon::logs(&data_dir, follow, lines),\n669\t        // Already handled above\n670\t        DaemonAction::Install | DaemonAction::Uninstall => unreachable!(),\n671\t    }\n672\t}\n673\t\n674\t/// Format daemon status for human-readable output\n675\tfn print_daemon_status(info: &crate::daemon::DaemonInfo) {\n676\t    if !info.running {\n677\t        println!(\"Daemon: stopped\");\n678\t        return;\n679\t    }\n680\t\n681\t    println!(\"Daemon: running\");\n682\t\n683\t    if let Some(pid) = info.pid {\n684\t        println!(\"  PID: {}\", pid);\n685\t    }\n686\t\n687\t    if let Some(secs) = info.uptime_secs {\n688\t        println!(\"  Uptime: {}\", crate::daemon::format_duration(secs));\n689\t    }\n690\t\n691\t    if let Some(rss) = info.rss_bytes {\n692\t        println!(\"  RSS: {}\", crate::daemon::format_bytes(rss));\n693\t    }\n694\t\n695\t    if let Some(peak) = info.peak_rss_bytes {\n696\t        println!(\"  Peak RSS: {}\", crate::daemon::format_bytes(peak));\n697\t    }\n698\t\n699\t    if let Some(sessions) = info.sessions_indexed {\n700\t        println!(\"  Sessions indexed: {}\", sessions);\n701\t    }\n702\t\n703\t    if let Some(ts) = info.last_scrape {\n704\t        println!(\"  Last scrape: {}\", ts.to_rfc3339());\n705\t    }\n706\t\n707\t    if let Some(ts) = info.started_at {\n708\t        println!(\"  Started at: {}\", ts.to_rfc3339());\n709\t    }\n710\t}\n711\t\n712\t/// Run config commands\n713\tfn run_config(action: ConfigAction) -> Result<()> {\n714\t    match action {\n715\t        ConfigAction::Init { force } => {\n716\t            let data_dir = config::init(force)?;\n717\t            println!(\n718\t                \"Initialized AgentScribe data directory: {}\",\n719\t                data_dir.display()\n720\t            );\n721\t            Ok(())\n722\t        }\n723\t        ConfigAction::Show => {\n724\t            let config = load_config()?;\n725\t            let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n726\t            println!(\"Data directory: {}\", data_dir.display());\n727\t            println!(\"Log level: {}\", config.general.log_level);\n728\t            println!(\"\\nScraping:\");\n729\t            println!(\"  Debounce: {}s\", config.scrape.debounce_seconds);\n730\t            println!(\n731\t                \"  Max session age: {} days\",\n732\t                config.scrape.max_session_age_days\n733\t            );\n734\t            println!(\"  Git auto-commit: {}\", config.scrape.git_auto_commit);\n735\t            println!(\"\\nSearch:\");\n736\t            println!(\n737\t                \"  Default max results: {}\",\n738\t                config.search.default_max_results\n739\t            );\n740\t            println!(\n741\t                \"  Default snippet length: {}\",\n742\t                config.search.default_snippet_length\n743\t            );\n744\t            Ok(())\n745\t        }\n746\t        ConfigAction::Set { key, value } => {\n747\t            let mut config = load_config()?;\n748\t            // Simple key-path setter (could be enhanced)\n749\t            match key.split('.').collect::<Vec<_>>().as_slice() {\n750\t                [\"general\", \"log_level\"] => config.general.log_level = value.clone(),\n751\t                [\"scrape\", \"debounce_seconds\"] => {\n752\t                    config.scrape.debounce_seconds = value.parse().unwrap_or(5);\n753\t                }\n754\t                [\"scrape\", \"max_session_age_days\"] => {\n755\t                    config.scrape.max_session_age_days = value.parse().unwrap_or(0);\n756\t                }\n757\t                [\"scrape\", \"git_auto_commit\"] => {\n758\t                    config.scrape.git_auto_commit =\n759\t                        matches!(value.to_lowercase().as_str(), \"true\" | \"1\" | \"yes\");\n760\t                }\n761\t                _ => {\n762\t                    eprintln!(\"Unknown configuration key: {}\", key);\n763\t                    return Ok(());\n764\t                }\n765\t            }\n766\t\n767\t            let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n768\t            let config_path = data_dir.join(\"config.toml\");\n769\t            config.save(&config_path)?;\n770\t            println!(\"Set {} = {}\", key, value);\n771\t            Ok(())\n772\t        }\n773\t        ConfigAction::Get { key } => {\n774\t            let config = load_config()?;\n775\t            let value = match key.split('.').collect::<Vec<_>>().as_slice() {\n776\t                [\"general\", \"data_dir\"] => config.data_dir()?.display().to_string(),\n777\t                [\"general\", \"log_level\"] => config.general.log_level.clone(),\n778\t                [\"scrape\", \"debounce_seconds\"] => config.scrape.debounce_seconds.to_string(),\n779\t                [\"scrape\", \"max_session_age_days\"] => {\n780\t                    config.scrape.max_session_age_days.to_string()\n781\t                }\n782\t                [\"scrape\", \"git_auto_commit\"] => config.scrape.git_auto_commit.to_string(),\n783\t                _ => {\n784\t                    eprintln!(\"Unknown configuration key: {}\", key);\n785\t                    return Ok(());\n786\t                }\n787\t            };\n788\t            println!(\"{}\", value);\n789\t            Ok(())\n790\t        }\n791\t    }\n792\t}\n793\t\n794\t/// Run plugins commands\n795\tfn run_plugins(action: PluginsAction) -> Result<()> {\n796\t    match action {\n797\t        PluginsAction::List { verbose } => {\n798\t            let config = load_config()?;\n799\t            let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n800\t            let plugin_dir = data_dir.join(\"plugins\");\n801\t\n802\t            let mut scraper = Scraper::new(data_dir)?;\n803\t            scraper.load_plugins()?;\n804\t\n805\t            let mut rows = Vec::new();\n806\t\n807\t            for (name, plugin) in scraper.plugin_manager().all() {\n808\t                rows.push(PluginRow {\n809\t                    name: name.clone(),\n810\t                    version: plugin.plugin.version.clone(),\n811\t                    format: plugin.source.format.as_str().to_string(),\n812\t                });\n813\t\n814\t                if verbose {\n815\t                    println!(\"Plugin: {}\", name);\n816\t                    println!(\"  Version: {}\", plugin.plugin.version);\n817\t                    println!(\"  Format: {}\", plugin.source.format.as_str());\n818\t                    println!(\"  Paths:\");\n819\t                    for path in &plugin.source.paths {\n820\t                        println!(\"    - {}\", path);\n821\t                    }\n822\t                    println!();\n823\t                }\n824\t            }\n825\t\n826\t            if !verbose {\n827\t                if rows.is_empty() {\n828\t                    println!(\"No plugins found in {}\", plugin_dir.display());\n829\t                } else {\n830\t                    println!(\"{}\", Table::new(rows));\n831\t                }\n832\t            }\n833\t\n834\t            Ok(())\n835\t        }\n836\t        PluginsAction::Validate { path } => {\n837\t            let plugin = validate_plugin_file(&path)?;\n838\t            println!(\"Plugin '{}' is valid!\", plugin.plugin.name);\n839\t            println!(\"  Version: {}\", plugin.plugin.version);\n840\t            println!(\"  Format: {}\", plugin.source.format.as_str());\n841\t            Ok(())\n842\t        }\n843\t        PluginsAction::Show { name } => {\n844\t            let config = load_config()?;\n845\t            let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n846\t            let mut scraper = Scraper::new(data_dir)?;\n847\t            scraper.load_plugins()?;\n848\t\n849\t            if let Some(plugin) = scraper.plugin_manager().get(&name) {\n850\t                println!(\"Plugin: {}\", plugin.plugin.name);\n851\t                println!(\"  Version: {}\", plugin.plugin.version);\n852\t                println!(\"  Format: {}\", plugin.source.format.as_str());\n853\t                println!(\"\\n  Source paths:\");\n854\t                for path in &plugin.source.paths {\n855\t                    println!(\"    - {}\", path);\n856\t                }\n857\t                if !plugin.source.exclude.is_empty() {\n858\t                    println!(\"  Excludes:\");\n859\t                    for pattern in &plugin.source.exclude {\n860\t                        println!(\"    - {}\", pattern);\n861\t                    }\n862\t                }\n863\t                println!(\"\\n  Session detection:\");\n864\t                match &plugin.source.session_detection {\n865\t                    crate::plugin::SessionDetection::OneFilePerSession { .. } => {\n866\t                        println!(\"    Method: one-file-per-session\");\n867\t                    }\n868\t                    crate::plugin::SessionDetection::TimestampGap { gap_threshold } => {\n869\t                        println!(\"    Method: timestamp-gap ({})\", gap_threshold);\n870\t                    }\n871\t                    crate::plugin::SessionDetection::Delimiter { delimiter_pattern } => {\n872\t                        println!(\"    Method: delimiter ({})\", delimiter_pattern);\n873\t                    }\n874\t                }\n875\t            } else {\n876\t                eprintln!(\"Plugin '{}' not found\", name);\n877\t                std::process::exit(1);\n878\t            }\n879\t\n880\t            Ok(())\n881\t        }\n882\t    }\n883\t}\n884\t\n885\t/// Run scrape command\n886\tfn run_scrape(\n887\t    plugin: Option<String>,\n888\t    file: Option<PathBuf>,\n889\t    dry_run: bool,\n890\t    _output_events: bool,\n891\t    _json: bool,\n892\t) -> Result<()> {\n893\t    let config = load_config()?;\n894\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n895\t\n896\t    // Initialize if needed\n897\t    if !data_dir.exists() {\n898\t        println!(\"Data directory not found. Use --plugin to specify.\");\n924\t                std::process::exit(1);\n925\t            }\n926\t        });\n927\t\n928\t        if let Some(p) = scraper.plugin_manager().get(&plugin_name).cloned() {\n929\t            if dry_run {\n930\t                println!(\"Dry run - would scrape with plugin: {}\", plugin_name);\n931\t                println!(\"  File: {}\", file_path.display());\n932\t                println!(\"  Format: {}\", p.source.format.as_str());\n933\t                // For dry run, just show we'd process it\n934\t                println!(\"  Would detect sessions and parse events...\");\n935\t            } else {\n936\t                let result = scraper.scrape_file(&file_path, &p)?;\n937\t                scraper.state_manager().save()?;\n938\t                println!(\"Scraped {} session(s)\", result.sessions_scraped);\n939\t                if result.sessions_indexed > 0 {\n940\t                    println!(\"Indexed {} session(s)\", result.sessions_indexed);\n941\t                }\n942\t                if !result.errors.is_empty() {\n943\t                    eprintln!(\"Errors: {}\", result.errors.len());\n944\t                }\n945\t                if config.scrape.git_auto_commit && git_auto_commit(&data_dir, &result)? {\n946\t                    println!(\"Git: committed {} session(s)\", result.sessions_scraped);\n947\t                }\n948\t            }\n949\t        } else {\n950\t            eprintln!(\"Plugin '{}' not found\", plugin_name);\n951\t            std::process::exit(1);\n952\t        }\n953\t    } else if let Some(plugin_name) = plugin {\n954\t        // Scrape specific plugin\n955\t        println!(\"Scraping plugin: {}\", plugin_name);\n956\t\n957\t        if let Some(p) = scraper.plugin_manager().get(&plugin_name).cloned() {\n958\t            if dry_run {\n959\t                println!(\"Dry run - would discover and scrape files:\");\n960\t                let files = scraper.discover_files(&p)?;\n961\t                for file in files {\n962\t                    println!(\"  - {}\", file.display());\n963\t                }\n964\t            } else {\n965\t                let result = scraper.scrape_plugin(&p)?;\n966\t                scraper.state_manager().save()?;\n967\t                println!(\n968\t                    \"Scraped {} session(s) from {} file(s)\",\n969\t                    result.sessions_scraped, result.files_processed\n970\t                );\n971\t                if result.sessions_indexed > 0 {\n972\t                    println!(\"Indexed {} session(s)\", result.sessions_indexed);\n973\t                }\n974\t                if result.files_skipped > 0 {\n975\t                    println!(\"  ({} files unchanged, skipped)\", result.files_skipped);\n976\t                }\n977\t                if !result.errors.is_empty() {\n978\t                    eprintln!(\"Errors: {}\", result.errors.len());\n979\t                    for error in &result.errors[..result.errors.len().min(5)] {\n980\t                        eprintln!(\"  - {}: {}\", error.file, error.message);\n981\t                    }\n982\t                    if result.errors.len() > 5 {\n983\t                        eprintln!(\"  ... and {} more\", result.errors.len() - 5);\n984\t                    }\n985\t                }\n986\t                if config.scrape.git_auto_commit && git_auto_commit(&data_dir, &result)? {\n987\t                    println!(\"Git: committed {} session(s)\", result.sessions_scraped);\n988\t                }\n989\t            }\n990\t        } else {\n991\t            eprintln!(\"Plugin '{}' not found\", plugin_name);\n992\t            std::process::exit(1);\n993\t        }\n994\t    } else {\n995\t        // Scrape all plugins\n996\t        println!(\"Scraping all plugins...\");\n997\t\n998\t        if dry_run {\n999\t            for plugin_name in scraper.plugin_manager().names() {\n1000\t                println!(\"  - {}\", plugin_name);\n1001\t            }\n1002\t        } else {\n1003\t            let result = scraper.scrape_all()?;\n1004\t            println!(\"Scraped {} session(s) total\", result.sessions_scraped);\n1005\t            if result.sessions_indexed > 0 {\n1006\t                println!(\"Indexed {} session(s)\", result.sessions_indexed);\n1007\t            }\n1008\t            if !result.errors.is_empty() {\n1009\t                eprintln!(\"Errors: {}\", result.errors.len());\n1010\t            }\n1011\t            if config.scrape.git_auto_commit && git_auto_commit(&data_dir, &result)? {\n1012\t                println!(\n1013\t                    \"Git: committed {} session(s) ({})\",\n1014\t                    result.sessions_scraped,\n1015\t                    result.agent_types.join(\", \")\n1016\t                );\n1017\t            }\n1018\t        }\n1019\t    }\n1020\t\n1021\t    Ok(())\n1022\t}\n1023\t\n1024\t/// Run search command\n1025\t#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]\n1026\tfn run_search(\n1027\t    query: Option<String>,\n1028\t    error: Option<String>,\n1029\t    code: Option<String>,\n1030\t    lang: Option<String>,\n1031\t    solution_only: bool,\n1032\t    like: Option<String>,\n1033\t    session: Option<String>,\n1034\t    agent: Vec<String>,\n1035\t    project: Option<String>,\n1036\t    since: Option<String>,\n1037\t    before: Option<String>,\n1038\t    tag: Vec<String>,\n1039\t    outcome: Option<String>,\n1040\t    doc_type_filter: Option<String>,\n1041\t    model: Option<String>,\n1042\t    fuzzy: bool,\n1043\t    edit_distance: Option<u8>,\n1044\t    max_results: usize,\n1045\t    snippet_length: usize,\n1046\t    token_budget: Option<usize>,\n1047\t    offset: usize,\n1048\t    sort: String,\n1049\t    hint: bool,\n1050\t    json: bool,\n1051\t) -> Result<()> {\n1052\t    let config = load_config()?;\n1053\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n1054\t\n1055\t    let sort_order = match sort.as_str() {\n1056\t        \"newest\" => SortOrder::Newest,\n1057\t        \"oldest\" => SortOrder::Oldest,\n1058\t        \"turns\" => SortOrder::Turns,\n1059\t        _ => SortOrder::Relevance,\n1060\t    };\n1061\t\n1062\t    let since_dt = since.as_deref().map(search::parse_datetime).transpose()?;\n1063\t\n1064\t    let before_dt = before.as_deref().map(search::parse_datetime).transpose()?;\n1065\t\n1066\t    let opts = SearchOptions {\n1067\t        query,\n1068\t        error_pattern: error,\n1069\t        code_query: code,\n1070\t        code_lang: lang,\n1071\t        solution_only,\n1072\t        like_session: like,\n1073\t        session_id: session,\n1074\t        agent,\n1075\t        project,\n1076\t        since: since_dt,\n1077\t        before: before_dt,\n1078\t        tag,\n1079\t        outcome,\n1080\t        doc_type_filter,\n1081\t        model,\n1082\t        file_path: None,\n1083\t        git_commit: None,\n1084\t        fuzzy,\n1085\t        fuzzy_distance: edit_distance.unwrap_or(config.search.fuzzy_edit_distance),\n1086\t        max_results,\n1087\t        snippet_length,\n1088\t        token_budget,\n1089\t        offset,\n1090\t        sort: integration\n1097\t        if let Some(result) = output.results.first() {\n1098\t            let text = result\n1099\t                .snippet\n1100\t                .as_deref()\n1101\t                .or(result.summary.as_deref())\n1102\t                .unwrap_or(\"\")\n1103\t                .trim();\n1104\t            let one_line: String = text.split_whitespace().collect::<Vec<_>>().join(\" \");\n1105\t            if !one_line.is_empty() {\n1106\t                if one_line.len() > 120 {\n1107\t                    println!(\"{}...\", &one_line[..117]);\n1108\t                } else {\n1109\t                    println!(\"{}\", one_line);\n1110\t                }\n1111\t            }\n1112\t        }\n1113\t    } else if json {\n1114\t        println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&output).unwrap());\n1115\t    } else {\n1116\t        println!(\"{}\", search::format_human(&output, snippet_length));\n1117\t    }\n1118\t\n1119\t    Ok(())\n1120\t}\n1121\t\n1122\t/// Run shell-hook command\n1123\tfn run_shell_hook(shell: &str) -> Result<()> {\n1124\t    let config = load_config().unwrap_or_default();\n1125\t    let snippet = crate::shell_hook::generate_hook(shell, &config.shell_hook)?;\n1126\t    print!(\"{}\", snippet);\n1127\t    Ok(())\n1128\t}\n1129\t\n1130\t/// Run index subcommands\n1131\tfn run_index(action: IndexAction) -> Result<()> {\n1132\t    let config = load_config()?;\n1133\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n1134\t\n1135\t    if !data_dir.exists() {\n1136\t        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n1137\t        std::process::exit(1);\n1138\t    }\n1139\t\n1140\t    match action {\n1141\t        IndexAction::Rebuild { plugin, heap_size } => {\n1142\t            run_index_rebuild(&data_dir, plugin.as_deref(), heap_size)\n1143\t        }\n1144\t        IndexAction::Stats => run_index_stats(&data_dir),\n1145\t        IndexAction::Optimize => run_index_optimize(&data_dir),\n1146\t    }\n1147\t}\n1148\t\n1149\t/// Run index rebuild: drop existing index and rebuild from session files.\n1150\tfn run_index_rebuild(\n1151\t    data_dir: &std::path::Path,\n1152\t    plugin_filter: Option<&str>,\n1153\t    heap_size: usize,\n1154\t) -> Result<()> {\n1155\t    let sessions_dir = data_dir.join(\"sessions\");\n1156\t\n1157\t    if !sessions_dir.exists() {\n1158\t        eprintln!(\"No sessions directory found. Run 'agentscribe scrape' first.\");\n1159\t        std::process::exit(2);\n1160\t    }\n1161\t\n1162\t    // Drop existing index\n1163\t    let index_path = data_dir.join(\"index\").join(\"tantivy\");\n1164\t    if index_path.exists() {\n1165\t        println!(\"Dropping existing index...\");\n1166\t        std::fs::remove_dir_all(&index_path)?;\n1167\t    }\n1168\t\n1169\t    let mut manager = IndexManager::open(data_dir)?;\n1170\t    manager.set_heap_size(heap_size);\n1171\t    manager.begin_write()?;\n1172\t\n1173\t    let mut total_docs = 0usize;\n1174\t    let mut total_errors = 0usize;\n1175\t\n1176\t    // Walk session directories\n1177\t    let entries = match std::fs::read_dir(&sessions_dir) {\n1178\t        Ok(e) => e,\n1179\t        Err(_) => {\n1180\t            eprintln!(\"Cannot read sessions directory.\");\n1181\t            std::process::exit(2);\n1182\t        }\n1183\t    };\n1184\t\n1185\t    for agent_entry in entries.filter_map(|e| e.ok()) {\n1186\t        let agent_path = agent_entry.path();\n1187\t        if !agent_path.is_dir() {\n1188\t            continue;\n1189\t        }\n1190\t\n1191\t        let agent_name = match agent_path.file_name().and_then(|n| n.to_str()) {\n1192\t            Some(n) => n.to_string(),\n1193\t            None => continue,\n1194\t        };\n1195\t\n1196\t        // Apply plugin filter\n1197\t        if let Some(filter) = plugin_filter {\n1198\t            if agent_name != filter {\n1199\t                continue;\n1200\t            }\n1201\t        }\n1202\t\n1203\t        let session_files = match std::fs::read_dir(&agent_path) {\n1204\t            Ok(e) => e,\n1205\t            Err(_) => continue,\n1206\t        };\n1207\t\n1208\t        for session_entry in session_files.filter_map(|e| e.ok()) {\n1209\t            let session_path = session_entry.path();\n1210\t            if session_path.extension().and_then(|e| e.to_str()) != Some(\"jsonl\") {\n1211\t                continue;\n1212\t            }\n1213\t\n1214\t            let session_id = format!(\n1215\t                \"{}/{}\",\n1216\t                agent_name,\n1217\t                session_path\n1218\t                    .file_stem()\n1219\t                    .and_then(|s| s.to_str())\n1220\t                    .unwrap_or(\"unknown\")\n1221\t            );\n1222\t\n1223\t            // Read events from the normalized session file\n1224\t            let file = match std::fs::File::open(&session_path) {\n1225\t                Ok(f) => f,\n1226\t                Err(e) => {\n1227\t                    eprintln!(\"Error reading {}: {}\", session_path.display(), e);\n1228\t                    total_errors += 1;\n1229\t                    continue;\n1230\t                }\n1231\t            };\n1232\t\n1233\t            use std::io::BufRead;\n1234\t            let reader = std::io::BufReader::new(file);\n1235\t            let mut events = Vec::new();\n1236\t\n1237\t            for line in reader.lines() {\n1238\t                match line {\n1239\t                    Ok(l) => {\n1240\t                        if let Ok(event) = crate::event::Event::from_jsonl(&l) {\n1241\t                            events.push(event);\n1242\t                        }\n1243\t                    }\n1244\t                    Err(_) => {\n1245\t                        total_errors += 1;\n1246\t                        continue;\n1247\t                    }\n1248\t                }\n1249\t            }\n1250\t\n1251\t            if events.is_empty() {\n1252\t                continue;\n1253\t            }\n1254\t\n1255\t            // Build manifest from events\n1256\t            let first = &events[0];\n1257\t            let manifest = crate::index::build_manifest_from_events(\n1258\t                &events,\n1259\t                &session_id,\n1260\t                &agent_name,\n1261\t                first.project.as_deref(),\n1262\t                first.model.as_deref(),\n1263\t            );\n1264\t\n1265\t            match manager.index_session(&events, &manifest) {\n1266\t                Ok(_) => total_docs += 1,\n1267\t                Err(e) => {\n1268\t                    eprintln!(\"Error indexing {}: {}\", session_id, e);\n1269\t                    total_errors += 1;\n1270\t                }\n1271\t            }\n1272\t        }\n1273\t    }\n1274\t\n1275\t    manager.finish()?;\n1276\t\n1277\t    println!(\n1278\t        \"Rebuilt index from {} session files ({} errors)\",\n1279\t        total_docs, total_errors\n1280\t    );\n1281\t    Ok(())\n1282\t}\n1283\t\n1284\t/// Show index statistics.\n1285\tfn run_index_stats(data_dir: &std::path::Path) -> Result<()> {\n1286\t    let index_path = data_dir.join(\"index\").join(\"tantivy\");\n1287\t\n1288\t    if !index_path.exists() {\n1289\t        println!(\"Index not found. Run 'agentscribe scrape' first.\");\n1290\t        return Ok(());\n1291\t    }\n1292\t\n1293\t    let index = match search::open_index(data_dir) {\n1294\t        Ok(i) => i,\n1295\t        Err(e) => {\n1296\t            eprintln!(\"Error opening index: {}\", e);\n1297\t            std::process::exit(1);\n1298\t        }\n1299\t    };\n1300\t\n1301\t    let reader = index.reader().map_err(|e| {\n1302\t        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to create reader: {}\", e))\n1303\t    })?;\n1304\t    let searcher = reader.searcher();\n1305\t\n1306\t    let num_docs = searcher.num_docs();\n1307\t    let segments = index.searchable_segment_metas().map_err(|e| {\n1308\t        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to get segment metas: {}\", e))\n1309\t    })?;\n1310\t    let num_segments = segments.len();\n1311\t    let schema = index.schema();\n1312\t    let fields: Vec<String> = schema\n1313\t        .fields()\n1314\t        .map(|(field, _)| schema.get_field_name(field).to_string())\n1315\t        .collect();\n1316\t\n1317\t    let size_bytes = dir_size(&index_path);\n1318\t\n1319\t    println!(\"Tantivy index at {}\", index_path.display());\n1320\t    println!(\"  Documents:    {}\", num_docs);\n1321\t    println!(\"  Segments:     {}\", num_segments);\n1322\t    println!(\"  Size on disk: {}\", format_bytes(size_bytes));\n1323\t    println!(\"  Fields:       {}\", fields.join(\", \"));\n1324\t\n1325\t    Ok(())\n1326\t}\n1327\t\n1328\t/// Optimize the index by merging segments.\n1329\tfn run_index_optimize(data_dir: &std::path::Path) -> Result<()> {\n1330\t    let index_path = data_dir.join(\"index\").join(\"tantivy\");\n1331\t\n1332\t    if !index_path.exists() {\n1333\t        println!(\"Index not found. Run 'agentscribe scrape' first.\");\n1334\t        return Ok(());\n1335\t    }\n1336\t\n1337\t    let pre_size = dir_size(&index_path);\n1338\t\n1339\t    let index = search::open_index(data_dir)?;\n1340\t    let segment_ids = index.searchable_segment_ids().map_err(|e| {\n1341\t        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to get segment IDs: {}\", e))\n1342\t    })?;\n1343\t    let num_segments = segment_ids.len();\n1344\t\n1345\t    println!(\"Merging {} segments...\", num_segments);\n1346\t\n1347\t    let mut writer = index\n1348\t        .writer::<tantivy::TantivyDocument>(50_000_000)\n1349\t        .map_err(|e| {\n1350\t            crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to open writer: {}\", e))\n1351\t        })?;\n1352\t\n1353\t    // Merge all segments into one and wait for completion\n1354\t    writer.merge(&segment_ids).wait().map_err(|e| {\n1355\t        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to merge segments: {}\", e))\n1356\t    })?;\n1357\t    writer.garbage_collect_files().wait().map_err(|e| {\n1358\t        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to garbage collect: {}\", e))\n1359\t    })?;\n1360\t\n1361\t    let post_size = dir_size(&index_path);\n1362\t\n1363\t    println!(\n1364\t        \"Merged {} segments ({} → {})\",\n1365\t        num_segments,\n1366\t        format_bytes(pre_size),\n1367\t        format_bytes(post_size)\n1368\t    );\n1369\t\n1370\t    Ok(())\n1371\t}\n1372\t\n1373\t/// Run status command\n1374\tfn run_status(json: bool, plugin_filter: Option<String>) -> Result<()> {\n1375\t    let config = load_config()?;\n1376\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n1377\t    let data_dir_str = data_dir.display().to_string();\n1378\t\n1379\t    if !data_dir.exists() {\n1380\t        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n1381\t        std::process::exit(1);\n1382\t    }\n1383\t\n1384\t    let mut scraper = Scraper::new(data_dir.clone())?;\n1385\t    scraper.load_plugins()?;\n1386\t\n1387\t    // Determine which plugins to show\n1388\t    let plugin_names: Vec<String> = if let Some(ref filter) = plugin_filter {\n1389\t        if scraper.plugin_manager().get(filter).is_some() {\n1390\t            vec![filter.clone()]\n1391\t        } else {\n1392\t            eprintln!(\"Plugin '{}' not found\", filter);\n1393\t            std::process::exit(1);\n1394\t        }\n1395\t    } else {\n1396\t        scraper\n1397\t            .plugin_manager()\n1398\t            .names()\n1399\t            .into_iter()\n1400\t            .map(String::from)\n1401\t            .collect()\n1402\t    };\n1403\t\n1404\t    // Gather scrape state\n1405\t    let scrape_state = scraper.state_manager().get_all();\n1406\t\n1407\t    // Collect per-plugin status\n1408\t    let mut plugin_statuses = Vec::new();\n1409\t    let mut _total_events: u64 = 0;\n1410\t    let mut total_sources: usize = 0;\n1411\t    let mut total_bytes: u64 = 0;\n1412\t\n1413\t    for plugin_name in &plugin_names {\n1414\t        let sessions = scraper.list_sessions(plugin_name)?;\n1415\t\n1416\t        // Count events across all sessions for this plugin\n1417\t        let mut plugin_events: u64 = 0;\n1418\t        for session_id in &sessions {\n1419\t            if let Ok(events) = scraper.read_session(session_id) {\n1420\t                plugin_events += events.len() as u64;\n1421\t            }\n1422\t        }\n1423\t        _total_events += plugin_events;\n1424\t\n1425\t        // Get source paths and truncation_limit from plugin config\n1426\t        let (source_paths, truncation_limit) = scraper\n1427\t            .plugin_manager()\n1428\t            .get(plugin_name)\n1429\t            .map(|p| (p.source.paths.clone(), p.source.truncation_limit))\n1430\t            .unwrap_or_default();\n1431\t\n1432\t        // Find last scraped time and byte totals from scrape state for this plugin\n1433\t        let plugin_files: Vec<_> = scrape_state\n1434\t            .sources\n1435\t            .iter()\n1436\t            .filter(|(_, s)| s.plugin == *plugin_name)\n1437\t            .collect();\n1438\t\n1439\t        let last_scraped = plugin_files.iter().map(|(_, s)| s.last_scraped).max();\n1440\t\n1441\t        let mut plugin_bytes: u64 = 0;\n1442\t        for (_, file_state) in &plugin_files {\n1443\t            plugin_bytes += file_state.last_byte_offset;\n1444\t            total_bytes += file_state.last_byte_offset;\n1445\t        }\n1446\t        total_sources += plugin_files.len();\n1447\t\n1448\t        plugin_statuses.push(PluginStatus {\n1449\t            name: plugin_name.to_string(),\n1450\t            sessions: sessions.len(),\n1451\t            events: plugin_events,\n1452\t            last_scraped,\n1453\t            source_paths,\n1454\t            source_files: plugin_files.len(),\n1455\t            bytes: plugin_bytes,\n1456\t            truncation_limit,\n1457\t        });\n1458\t    }\n1459\t\n1460\t    // Daemon state (Phase 4 - check PID file if it exists)\n1461\t    let daemon_status = get_daemon_status(&data_dir);\n1462\t\n1463\t    // Disk usage of data directory\n1464\t    let dir_bytes = dir_size(&data_dir);\n1465\t\n1466\t    // Index stats (Phase 2 - check if index directory exists)\n1467\t    let index_dir = data_dir.join(\"index\");\n1468\t    let index_stats = get_index_stats(&index_dir);\n1469\t\n1470\t    if json {\n1471\t        use serde_json::json;\n1472\t        let mut plugins_json = Vec::new();\n1473\t        for ps in &plugin_statuses {\n1474\t            let mut p = json!({\n1475\t                \"name\": ps.name,\n1476\t                \"sessions\": ps.sessions,\n1477\t                \"events\": ps.events,\n1478\t                \"source_files\": ps.source_files,\n1479\t                \"bytes\": ps.bytes,\n1480\t                \"source_paths\": ps.source_paths,\n1481\t            });\n1482\t            if let Some(ts) = ps.last_scraped {\n1483\t                p[\"last_scraped\"] = json!(ts.to_rfc3339());\n1484\t            } else {\n1485\t                p[\"last_scraped\"] = json!(null);\n1486\t            }\n1487\t            plugins_json.push(p);\n1488\t        }\n1489\t\n1490\t        let status = json!({\n1491\t            \"version\": env!(\"CARGO_PKG_VERSION\"),\n1492\t            \"data_dir\": data_dir_str,\n1493\t            \"data_dir_bytes\": dir_bytes,\n1494\t            \"plugins\": plugins_json,\n1495\t            \"scrape_state\": {\n1496\t                \"tracked_sources\": total_sources,\n1497\t                \"total_bytes\": total_bytes,\n1498\t            },\n1499\t            \"daemon\": {\n1500\t                \"running\": daemon_status.running,\n1501\t                \"pid\": daemon_status.pid,\n1502\t            },\n1503\t            \"index\": {\n1504\t                \"exists\": index_stats.exists,\n1505\t                \"documents\": index_stats.documents,\n1506\t                \"size_bytes\": index_stats.size_bytes,\n1507\t            },\n1508\t        });\n1509\t\n1510\t        println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&status).unwrap());\n1511\t    } else {\n1512\t        println!(\"AgentScribe v{}\", env!(\"CARGO_PKG_VERSION\"));\n1513\t        println!(\"Data dir: {} ({})\", data_dir_str, format_bytes(dir_bytes));\n1514\t\n1515\t        // Daemon\n1516\t        if daemon_status.running {\n1517\t            if let Some(pid) = daemon_status.pid {\n1518\t                println!(\"Daemon: running (PID {})\", pid);\n1519\t            } else {\n1520\t                println!(\"Daemon: running\");\n1521\t            }\n1522\t        } else {\n1523\t            println!(\"Daemon: stopped\");\n1524\t        }\n1525\t\n1526\t        // Plugins\n1527\t        println!(\"\\nPlugins:\");\n1528\t        if plugin_statuses.is_empty() {\n1529\t            println!(\"  (none)\");\n1530\t        }\n1531\t        for ps in &plugin_statuses {\n1532\t            let last = match ps.last_scraped {\n1533\t                Some(ts) => format_ago(ts),\n1534\t                None => \"never scraped\".to_string(),\n1535\t            };\n1536\t            println!(\n1537\t                \"  {:<14} {:>4} sessions  {:>6} events  {}  ({} source files, {})\",\n1538\t                ps.name,\n1539\t                ps.sessions,\n1540\t                ps.events,\n1541\t                last,\n1542\t                ps.source_files,\n1543\t                format_bytes(ps.bytes)\n1544\t            );\n1545\t        }\n1546\t\n1547\t        // Windsurf truncation warning\n1548\t        for ps in &plugin_statuses {\n1549\t            if ps.name == \"windsurf\" {\n1550\t                if let Some(limit) = ps.truncation_limit {\n1551\t                    println!(\n1552\t                        \"\\n  WARNING: Windsurf retains at most {} conversations.\",\n1553\t                        limit\n1554\t                    );\n1555\t                    println!(\n1556\t                        \"  Old conversations are silently overwritten. Run 'agentscribe scrape'\"\n1557\t                    );\n1558\t                    println!(\n1559\t                        \"  frequently (e.g., via 'agentscribe daemon start') to avoid data loss.\"\n1560\t                    );\n1561\t                    break;\n1562\t                }\n1563\t            }\n1564\t        }\n1565\t\n1566\t        // Index\n1567\t        if index_stats.exists {\n1568\t            println!(\n1569\t                \"\\nIndex: {} documents, {} on disk\",\n1570\t                index_stats.documents,\n1571\t                format_bytes(index_stats.size_bytes)\n1572\t            );\n1573\t        } else {\n1574\t            println!(\"\\nIndex: not built (run 'agentscribe index rebuild')\");\n1575\t        }\n1576\t\n1577\t        // Scrape state\n1578\t        println!(\n1579\t            \"\\nScrape state: tracking offsets for {} source paths ({} total)\",\n1580\t            total_sources,\n1581\t            format_bytes(total_bytes)\n1582\t        );\n1583\t    }\n1584\t\n1585\t    Ok(())\n1586\t}\n1587\t\n1588\t/// Per-plugin status data\n1589\tstruct PluginStatus {\n1590\t    name: String,\n1591\t    sessions: usize,\n1592\t    events: u64,\n1593\t    last_scraped: Option<chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>>,\n1594\t    source_paths: Vec<String>,\n1595\t    source_files: usize,\n1596\t    bytes: u64,\n1597\t    truncation_limit: Option<u32>,\n1598\t}\n1599\t\n1600\t/// Daemon status info\n1601\tstruct DaemonStatus {\n1602\t    running: bool,\n1603\t    pid: Option<u32>,\n1604\t}\n1605\t\n1606\t/// Index stats\n1607\tstruct IndexStats {\n1608\t    exists: bool,\n1609\t    documents: usize,\n1610\t    size_bytes: u64,\n1611\t}\n1612\t\n1613\t/// Check daemon status by reading PID file\n1614\tfn get_daemon_status(data_dir: &std::path::Path) -> DaemonStatus {\n1615\t    let pid_file = data_dir.join(\"agentscribe.pid\");\n1616\t    if let Ok(content) = std::fs::read_to_string(&pid_file) {\n1617\t        if let Ok(pid) = content.trim().parse::<u32>() {\n1618\t            // Check if process is actually running\n1619\t            unsafe {\n1620\t                // kill(pid, 0) checks if process exists without sending a signal\n1621\t                if libc::kill(pid as i32, 0) == 0 {\n1622\t                    return DaemonStatus {\n1623\t                        running: true,\n1624\t                        pid: Some(pid),\n1625\t                    };\n1626\t                }\n1627\t            }\n1628\t        }\n1629\t    }\n1630\t    DaemonStatus {\n1631\t        running: false,\n1632\t        pid: None,\n1633\t    }\n1634\t}\n1635\t\n1636\t/// Get index stats\n1637\tfn get_index_stats(index_dir: &std::path::Path) -> IndexStats {\n1638\t    let tantivy_dir = index_dir.join(\"tantivy\");\n1639\t    if !tantivy_dir.exists() {\n1640\t        return IndexStats {\n1641\t            exists: false,\n1642\t            documents: 0,\n1643\t            size_bytes: 0,\n1644\t        };\n1645\t    }\n1646\t\n1647\t    let size_bytes = dir_size(&tantivy_dir);\n1648\t\n1649\t    // Read actual document count from Tantivy index\n1650\t    let documents = match tantivy::Index::open_in_dir(&tantivy_dir) {\n1651\t        Ok(index) => match index.reader() {\n1652\t            Ok(reader) => reader.searcher().num_docs() as usize,\n1653\t            Err(_) => 0,\n1654\t        },\n1655\t        Err(_) => 0,\n1656\t    };\n1657\t\n1658\t    IndexStats {\n1659\t        exists: documents > 0 || size_bytes > 0,\n1660\t        documents,\n1661\t        size_bytes,\n1662\t    }\n1663\t}\n1664\t\n1665\t/// Format bytes as human-readable size\n1666\tfn format_bytes(bytes: u64) -> String {\n1667\t    const KB: u64 = 1024;\n1668\t    const MB: u64 = 1024 * KB;\n1669\t    const GB: u64 = 1024 * MB;\n1670\t\n1671\t    if bytes >= GB {\n1672\t        format!(\"{:.1} GB\", bytes as f64 / GB as f64)\n1673\t    } else if bytes >= MB {\n1674\t        format!(\"{:.1} MB\", bytes as f64 / MB as f64)\n1675\t    } else if bytes >= KB {\n1676\t        format!(\"{:.1} KB\", bytes as f64 / KB as f64)\n1677\t    } else {\n1678\t        format!(\"{} B\", bytes)\n1679\t    }\n1680\t}\n1681\t\n1682\t/// Format a timestamp as relative time ago\n1683\tfn format_ago(ts: chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>) -> String {\n1684\t    let now = chrono::Utc::now();\n1685\t    let duration = now.signed_duration_since(ts);\n1686\t\n1687\t    if duration.num_days() > 0 {\n1688\t        format!(\"{}d ago\", duration.num_days())\n1689\t    } else if duration.num_hours() > 0 {\n1690\t        format!(\"{}h ago\", duration.num_hours())\n1691\t    } else if duration.num_minutes() > 0 {\n1692\t        format!(\"{}m ago\", duration.num_minutes())\n1693\t    } else {\n1694\t        \"just now\".to_string()\n1695\t    }\n1696\t}\n1697\t\n1698\t/// Recursively compute directory size in bytes\n1699\tfn dir_size(path: &std::path::Path) -> u64 {\n1700\t    if !path.exists() {\n1701\t        return 0;\n1702\t    }\n1703\t\n1704\t    if path.is_file() {\n1705\t        return path.metadata().map(|m| m.len()).unwrap_or(0);\n1706\t    }\n1707\t\n1708\t    let mut total: u64 = 0;\n1709\t    if let Ok(entries) = std::fs::read_dir(path) {\n1710\t        for entry in entries.filter_map(|e| e.ok()) {\n1711\t            let p = entry.path();\n1712\t            if p.is_dir() {\n1713\t                total += dir_size(&p);\n1714\t            } else if let Ok(m) = p.metadata() {\n1715\t                total += m.len();\n1716\t            }\n1717\t        }\n1718\t    }\n1719\t    total\n1720\t}\n1721\t\n1722\t/// Count files with a given extension recursively\n1723\t#[allow(dead_code)]\n1724\tfn count_files_recursive(path: &std::path::Path, ext: &str) -> usize {\n1725\t    if !path.is_dir() {\n1726\t        return 0;\n1727\t    }\n1728\t\n1729\t    let mut count = 0;\n1730\t    if let Ok(entries) = std::fs::read_dir(path) {\n1731\t        for entry in entries.filter_map(|e| e.ok()) {\n1732\t            let p = entry.path();\n1733\t            if p.is_dir() {\n1734\t                count += count_files_recursive(&p, ext);\n1735\t            } else if p.extension().and_then(|s| s.to_str()) == Some(ext) {\n1736\t                count += 1;\n1737\t            }\n1738\t        }\n1739\t    }\n1740\t    count\n1741\t}\n1742\t\n1743\t/// Load configuration from default location\n1744\tfn load_config() -> Result<Config> {\n1745\t    let config_path = config::config_path();\n1746\t    if let Some(path) = config_path {\n1747\t        Config::load(&path)\n1748\t    } else {\n1749\t        Ok(Config::default())\n1750\t    }\n1751\t}\n1752\t\n1753\t/// Run recurring problem detection\n1754\tfn run_recurring(since: Option<String>, threshold: usize, json: bool) -> Result<()> {\n1755\t    let config = load_config()?;\n1756\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n1757\t\n1758\t    if !data_dir.exists() {\n1759\t        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n1760\t        std::process::exit(1);\n1761\t    }\n1762\t\n1763\t    let since_dt = match since {\n1764\t        Some(ref s) => search::parse_datetime(s)?,\n1765\t        None => chrono::Utc::now() - chrono::Duration::days(30),\n1766\t    };\n1767\t\n1768\t    let opts = crate::recurring::RecurringOptions {\n1769\t        since: since_dt,\n1770\t        threshold,\n1771\t    };\n1772\t\n1773\t    let output = crate::recurring::detect_recurring(&data_dir, &opts)?;\n1774\t\n1775\t    if json {\n1776\t        println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&output).unwrap());\n1777\t    } else {\n1778\t        print!(\"{}\", crate::recurring::format_human(&output));\n1779\t    }\n1780\t\n1781\t    Ok(())\n1782\t}\n1783\t\n1784\t/// Run rules extraction command\n1785\tfn run_rules(project_path: PathBuf, format: String, json: bool) -> Result<()> {\n1786\t    let config = load_config()?;\n1787\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n1788\t\n1789\t    if !data_dir.exists() {\n1790\t        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n1791\t        std::process::exit(1);\n1792\t    }\n1793\t\n1794\t    let output_format = match crate::rules::OutputFormat::from_str(&format) {\n1795\t        Some(f) => f,\n1796\t        None => {\n1797\t            eprintln!(\"Unknown format: {}. &project_path)?;\n1803\t\n1804\t    if json {\n1805\t        use serde_json::json;\n1806\t        let rules_json: Vec<serde_json::Value> = output\n1807\t            .rules\n1808\t            .iter()\n1809\t            .map(|r| match r {\n1810\t                crate::rules::Rule::Correction(s) => json!({\"type\": \"correction\", \"rule\": s}),\n1811\t                crate::rules::Rule::Convention(s) => json!({\"type\": \"convention\", \"rule\": s}),\n1812\t                crate::rules::Rule::Context(s) => json!({\"type\": \"context\", \"rule\": s}),\n1813\t                crate::rules::Rule::Warning(s) => json!({\"type\": \"warning\", \"rule\": s}),\n1814\t            })\n1815\t            .collect();\n1816\t\n1817\t        let result = json!({\n1818\t            \"project_path\": output.project_path.display().to_string(),\n1819\t            \"sessions_analyzed\": output.sessions_analyzed,\n1820\t            \"rules\": rules_json,\n1821\t        });\n1822\t        println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&result).unwrap());\n1823\t    } else {\n1824\t        if output.rules.is_empty() {\n1825\t            println!(\"{}\",     println!(\n1831\t            \"Wrote {} rules to {} ({} sessions analyzed)\",\n1832\t            output.rules.len(),\n1833\t            path.display(),\n1834\t            output.sessions_analyzed,\n1835\t        );\n1836\t    }\n1837\t\n1838\t    Ok(())\n1839\t}\n1840\t\n1841\t/// Run analytics command\n1842\tfn run_analytics(\n1843\t    agent: Option<String>,\n1844\t    project: Option<String>,\n1845\t    since: Option<String>,\n1846\t    json: bool,\n1847\t) -> Result<()> {\n1848\t    let config = load_config()?;\n1849\t    let data_dir = Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n1885\t        std::process::exit(1);\n1886\t    }\n1887\t\n1888\t    // Determine max age: CLI arg > config > error\n1889\t    let max_age = if let Some(ref duration_str) = older_than {\n1890\t        crate::gc::parse_duration(duration_str)?\n1891\t    } else if config.scrape.max_session_age_days > 0 {\n1892\t        chrono::Duration::days(config.scrape.max_session_age_days as i64)\n1893\t    } else {\n1894\t        eprintln!(\"No max session age configured. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n1916\t        std::process::exit(1);\n1917\t    }\n1918\t\n1919\t    let (file, line) = parse_blame_spec(&spec);\n1920\t\n1921\t    // If a line number was given, try to resolve the commit hash via git blame.\n1922\t    let commit_hash = if let Some(ln) = line {\n1923\t        git_blame_commit(&file, ln)\n1924\t    } else {\n1925\t        None\n1926\t    };\n1927\t\n1928\t    let opts = if let Some(hash) = commit_hash {\n1929\t        search::SearchOptions {\n1930\t            git_commit: Some(hash),\n1931\t            max_results,\n1932\t            sort: search::SortOrder::Newest,\n1933\t            ..Default::default()\n1934\t        }\n1935\t    } else {\n1936\t        search::SearchOptions {\n1937\t            file_path: Some(file.clone()),\n1938\t            max_results,\n1939\t            sort: search::SortOrder::Newest,\n1940\t            ..Default::default()\n1941\t        }\n1942\t    };\n1943\t\n1944\t    let output = match search::execute_search(&data_dir, &opts) {\n1945\t        Ok(o) => o,\n1946\t        Err(e) => {\n1947\t            eprintln!(\"Search error: {}\", e);\n1948\t            std::process::exit(1);\n1949\t        }\n1950\t    };\n1951\t\n1952\t    if json {\n1953\t        println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&output).unwrap());\n1954\t    } else {\n1955\t        if let Some(ln) = line {\n1956\t            println!(\"Sessions related to {}:{}\", file, ln);\n1957\t        } else {\n1958\t            println!(\"Sessions that touched: {}\", file);\n1959\t        }\n1960\t        println!(\"{}\", search::format_human(&output, 200));\n1961\t    }\n1962\t\n1963\t    Ok(())\n1964\t}\n1965\t\n1966\t/// Run file command: show all sessions that touched a file, chronologically.\n1967\tfn run_file(path: String, max_results: usize, json: bool) -> Result<()> {\n1968\t    let config = load_config()?;\n1969\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n1970\t\n1971\t    if !data_dir.exists() {\n1972\t        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n1973\t        std::process::exit(1);\n1974\t    }\n1975\t\n1976\t    let opts = search::SearchOptions {\n1977\t        file_path: Some(path.clone()),\n1978\t        max_results,\n1979\t        sort: search::SortOrder::Oldest,\n1980\t        ..Default::default()\n1981\t    };\n1982\t\n1983\t    let output = match search::execute_search(&data_dir, &opts) {\n1984\t        Ok(o) => o,\n1985\t        Err(e) => {\n1986\t            eprintln!(\"Search error: {}\", e);\n1987\t            std::process::exit(1);\n1988\t        }\n1989\t    };\n1990\t\n1991\t    if json {\n1992\t        println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&output).unwrap());\n1993\t    } else {\n1994\t        println!(\"Sessions that touched: {}\", path);\n1995\t        println!(\"{}\", search::format_human(&output, 200));\n1996\t    }\n1997\t\n1998\t    Ok(())\n1999\t}\n2000\t\n2001\t/// A summary entry for a single session (used in run_summarize).\n2002\t#[derive(serde::Serialize)]\n2003\tstruct SummaryEntry {\n2004\t    session_id: String,\n2005\t    summary: String,\n2006\t    project: Option<String>,\n2007\t    started: chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>,\n2008\t    outcome: Option<String>,\n2009\t    files_touched: Vec<String>,\n2010\t}\n2011\t\n2012\t/// Run summarize command: generate Markdown summaries for sessions.\n2013\tfn run_summarize(\n2014\t    session: Option<String>,\n2015\t    since: Option<String>,\n2016\t    project: Option<String>,\n2017\t    max_results: usize,\n2018\t    write: bool,\n2019\t    json: bool,\n2020\t) -> Result<()> {\n2021\t    let config = load_config()?;\n2022\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n2023\t\n2024\t    if !data_dir.exists() {\n2025\t        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. git_blame_commit(file: &str, line: u32) -> Option<String> {\n2180\t    let output = std::process::Command::new(\"git\")\n2181\t        .args([\n2182\t            \"blame\",\n2183\t            \"-L\",\n2184\t            &format!(\"{},{}\", line, line),\n2185\t            \"--porcelain\",\n2186\t            file,\n2187\t        ])\n2188\t        .output()\n2189\t        .ok()?;\n2190\t\n2191\t    if !output.status.success() {\n2192\t        return None;\n2193\t    }\n2194\t\n2195\t    let stdout = String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stdout);\n2196\t    let hash = stdout.lines().next()?.split_whitespace().next()?;\n2197\t\n2198\t    // All-zeros means the line is not yet committed\n2199\t    if hash.chars().all(|c| c == '0') {\n2200\t        return sessions_dir: &std::path::Path,\n2209\t    session_id: &str,\n2210\t) -> Result<Vec<crate::event::Event>> {\n2211\t    let parts: Vec<&str> = session_id.splitn(2, '/').collect();\n2212\t    if ids\n2273\t}\n2274\t\n2275\t/// Write a Markdown summary file alongside the session JSONL.\n2276\tfn write_summary_file(\n2277\t    sessions_dir: &std::path::Path,\n2278\t    session_id: &str,\n2279\t    let empty = 20 - filled;\n2470\t    format!(\"[{}{}]\", \"█\".repeat(filled), \"░\".repeat(empty))\n2471\t}\n2472\t\n2473\tfn format_resets_at(dt: chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>) -> String {\n2474\t );\n2533\t            queue.submit(input, config.whisper.max_retries).await\n2534\t        })?;\n2535\t        println!(\"Transcription job submitted: {}\", job_id);\n2536\t        return
