Render a session as structured Markdown\npub fn render_markdown(events: &[Event], meta: &SessionManifest) -> Result<String> {\n    let mut md = String::new();\n\n    // YAML frontmatter\n    md.push_str(\"---\\n\");\n    md.push_str(&format!(\"session_id: {}\\n\", meta.session_id));\n    md.push_str(&format!(\"source_agent: {}\\n\", meta.source_agent));\n    if let Some(ref project) = meta.project {\n        md.push_str(&format!(\"project: {}\\n\", project));\n    }\n    md.push_str(&format!(\"started: {}\\n\", meta.started.to_rfc3339()));\n    if let Some(ref ended) = meta.ended {\n        md.push_str(&format!(\"ended: {}\\n\", ended.to_rfc3339()));\n    }\n    md.push_str(&format!(\"turns: {}\\n\", meta.turns));\n    if let Some(ref outcome) = meta.outcome {\n        md.push_str(&format!(\"outcome: {}\\n\", outcome));\n    }\n    if !meta.files_touched.is_empty() {\n        md.push_str(&format!(\"files_touched:\\n\"));\n        for file in &meta.files_touched {\n            md.push_str(&format!(\"  - {}\\n\", file));\n        }\n    }\n    if let Some(ref model) = meta.model {\n        md.push_str(&format!(\"model: {}\\n\", model));\n    }\n    md.push_str(\"---\\n\\n\");\n\n    // Summary if available\n    if let Some(ref summary) = meta.summary {\n        md.push_str(&format!(\"**Summary:** {}\\n\\n\", summary));\n    }\n\n    // Conversation\n    for event in events {\n        let role_label = match event.role {\n            Role::User => \"**User**\",\n            Role::Assistant => \"**Assistant**\",\n            Role::System => \"**System**\",\n            Role::ToolCall => \"**Tool Call**\",\n            Role::ToolResult => \"**Tool Result**\",\n        };\n\n        md.push_str(&format!(\"{} ({})\\n\\n\", role_label, format_timestamp(&event.ts)));\n\n        if let Some(ref tool) = event.tool {\n            md.push_str(&format!(\"*Tool: {}*\\n\\n\", tool));\n        }\n\n        // Render content with code blocks preserved\n        md.push_str(&render_content_markdown(&event.content));\n        md.push_str(\"\\n\\n---\\n\\n\");\n    }\n\n    Ok(md)\n}\n\n/// Render content with code block detection for HTML\nfn render_content_html(content: &str) -> String {\n    let mut result = String::new();\n    let mut pos = 0;\n\n    // Detect code blocks: ```lang ... ```\n    while let Some(fence_start) = content[pos..].find(\"```\") {\n        // Add text before fence\n        let before_fence = &content[pos..pos + fence_start];\n        result.push_str(&escape_html(before_fence));\n\n        pos += fence_start + 3;\n\n        // Extract language (rest of line)\n        let lang_end = content[pos..]\n            .find('\\n')\n            .unwrap_or(content[pos..].len());\n        let lang = &content[pos..pos + lang_end];\n        let lang = lang.trim();\n\n        pos += lang_end + 1; // Skip newline\n\n        // Find closing fence\n        if let Some(fence_end) = content[pos..].find(\"```\") {\n            let code = &content[pos..pos + fence_end];\n\n            result.push_str(\"<pre><code class=\\\"language-\");\n            result.push_str(&escape_html(lang));\n            result.push_str(\"\\\">\");\n            result.push_str(&escape_html(code));\n            result.push_str(\"</code></pre>\");\n\n            pos += fence_end + 3;\n\n            // Skip trailing newline\n            if pos < content.len() && content.as_bytes()[pos] == b'\\n' {\n                pos += 1;\n            }\n        } else {\n            // No closing fence, treat rest as text\n            result.push_str(\"<pre>\");\n            result.push_str(&escape_html(&content[pos..]));\n            result.push_str(\"</pre>\");\n            break;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Add remaining text\n    if pos < content.len() {\n        result.push_str(&escape_html(&content[pos..]));\n    }\n\n    result\n}\n\n/// Render content with code block detection for Markdown\nfn render_content_markdown(content: &str) -> String {\n    // For Markdown, we mostly preserve the original formatting\n    // Just ensure newlines are handled correctly\n    content.to_string()\n}\n\n/// Format duration between start and end\nfn format_duration(start: DateTime<Utc>, end: Option<DateTime<Utc>>) -> String {\n    let end = end.unwrap_or_else(Utc::now);\n    let duration = end.signed_duration_since(start);\n\n    let mut parts: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n\n    if duration.num_days() > 0 {\n        parts.push(format!(\"{}d\", duration.num_days()));\n    }\n    if duration.num_hours() % 24 > 0 {\n        parts.push(format!(\"{}h\", duration.num_hours() % 24));\n    }\n    if duration.num_minutes() % 60 > 0 {\n        parts.push(format!(\"{}m\", duration.num_minutes() % 60));\n    }\n\n    if parts.is_empty() {\n        \"<1m\".to_string()\n    } else {\n        parts.join(\" \")\n    }\n}\n\n/// Format model(s) used\nfn format_models(model: Option<&str>) -> String {\n    model.unwrap_or(\"unknown\").to_string()\n}\n\n/// Format timestamp for display\nfn format_timestamp(ts: &DateTime<Utc>) -> String {\n    ts.format(\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC\").to_string()\n}\n\n/// Get role badge label\nfn role_badge_label(role: &Role) -> &'static str {\n    match role {\n        Role::User => \"User\",\n        Role::Assistant => \"Assistant\",\n        Role::System => \"System\",\n        Role::ToolCall => \"Tool\",\n        Role::ToolResult => \"Result\",\n    }\n}\n\n/// Escape HTML special characters\nfn escape_html(s: &str) -> String {\n    let mut result = String::with_capacity(s.len());\n    for c in s.chars() {\n        match c {\n            '&' => result.push_str(\"&amp;\"),\n            '<' => result.push_str(\"&lt;\"),\n            '>' => result.push_str(\"&gt;\"),\n            '\"' => result.push_str(\"&quot;\"),\n            '\\'' => result.push_str(\"&#x27;\"),\n            c => result.push(c),\n        }\n    }\n    result\n}\n\n/// Inline CSS for HTML output (~3KB budget)\nconst CSS: &str = r#\"\n:root {\n  --bg: #ffffff;\n  --fg: #1a1a1a;\n  --border: #e0e0e0;\n  --header-bg: #f5f5f5;\n  --code-bg: #f8f8f8;\n  --user-bg: #e3f2fd;\n  --assistant-bg: #f3e5f5;\n  --system-bg: #fff3e0;\n  --tool-bg: #e8f5e9;\n  --tool-result-bg: #fce4ec;\n}\n\n@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {\n  :root {\n    --bg: #1a1a1a;\n    --fg: #e0e0e0;\n    --border: #333333;\n    --header-bg: #2d2d2d;\n    --code-bg: #252525;\n    --user-bg: #1e3a5f;\n    --assistant-bg: #3e2e5f;\n    --system-bg: #5f4e1e;\n    --tool-bg: #1e5f3e;\n    --tool-result-bg: #5f1e3e;\n  }\n}\n\n* { box-sizing: border-box; }\n\nbody {\n  margin: 0;\n  padding: 0;\n  font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Monaco', 'Inconsolata', 'Fira Mono', 'Droid Sans Mono', 'Source Code Pro', monospace;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  line-height: 1.6;\n  background: var(--bg);\n  color: var(--fg);\n}\n\nheader {\n  padding: 16px;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);\n  background: var(--header-bg);\n}\n\n.header-row {\n  display: flex;\n  gap: 8px;\n  margin: 4px 0;\n}\n\n.header-label {\n  font-weight: 600;\n  min-width: 100px;\n}\n\n.conversation {\n  padding: 16px;\n  max-width: 900px;\n  margin: 0 auto;\n}\n\n.turn {\n  margin: 16px 0;\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 4px;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.turn-header {\n  padding: 8px 12px;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 12px;\n  background: var(--header-bg);\n}\n\n.role-badge {\n  padding: 2px 8px;\n  border-radius: 3px;\n  font-size: 12px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n\n.role-user { Render a session as structured Markdown\npub fn render_markdown(events: &[Event], meta: &SessionManifest) -> Result<String> {\n    let mut md = String::new();\n\n    // YAML frontmatter\n    md.push_str(\"---\\n\");\n    md.push_str(&format!(\"session_id: {}\\n\", meta.session_id));\n    md.push_str(&format!(\"source_agent: {}\\n\", meta.source_agent));\n    if let Some(ref project) = meta.project {\n        md.push_str(&format!(\"project: {}\\n\", project));\n    }\n    md.push_str(&format!(\"started: {}\\n\", meta.started.to_rfc3339()));\n    if let Some(ref ended) = meta.ended {\n        md.push_str(&format!(\"ended: {}\\n\", ended.to_rfc3339()));\n    }\n    md.push_str(&format!(\"turns: {}\\n\", meta.turns));\n    if let Some(ref outcome) = meta.outcome {\n        md.push_str(&format!(\"outcome: {}\\n\", outcome));\n    }\n    if !meta.files_touched.is_empty() {\n        md.push_str(\"files_touched:\\n\");\n        for file in &meta.files_touched {\n            md.push_str(&format!(\"  - {}\\n\", file));\n        }\n    }\n    if let Some(ref model) = meta.model {\n        md.push_str(&format!(\"model: {}\\n\", model));\n    }\n    md.push_str(\"---\\n\\n\");\n\n    // Summary if available\n    if let Some(ref summary) = meta.summary {\n        md.push_str(&format!(\"**Summary:** {}\\n\\n\", summary));\n    }\n\n    // Conversation\n    for event in events {\n        let role_label = match event.role {\n            Role::User => \"**User**\",\n            Role::Assistant => \"**Assistant**\",\n            Role::System => \"**System**\",\n            Role::ToolCall => \"**Tool Call**\",\n            Role::ToolResult => \"**Tool Result**\",\n        };\n\n        md.push_str(&format!(\"{} ({})\\n\\n\", role_label, format_timestamp(&event.ts)));\n\n        if let Some(ref tool) = event.tool {\n            md.push_str(&format!(\"*Tool: {}*\\n\\n\", tool));\n        }\n\n        // Render content with code blocks preserved\n        md.push_str(&render_content_markdown(&event.content));\n        md.push_str(\"\\n\\n---\\n\\n\");\n    }\n\n    Ok(md)\n}\n\n/// Render content with code block detection for HTML\nfn render_content_html(content: &str) -> String {\n    let mut result = String::new();\n    let mut pos = 0;\n\n    // Detect code blocks: ```lang ... ```\n    while let Some(fence_start) = content[pos..].find(\"```\") {\n        // Add text before fence\n        let before_fence = &content[pos..pos + fence_start];\n        result.push_str(&escape_html(before_fence));\n\n        pos += fence_start + 3;\n\n        // Extract language (rest of line)\n        let lang_end = content[pos..]\n            .find('\\n')\n            .unwrap_or(content[pos..].len());\n        let lang = &content[pos..pos + lang_end];\n        let lang = lang.trim();\n\n        pos += lang_end + 1; // Skip newline\n\n        // Find closing fence\n        if let Some(fence_end) = content[pos..].find(\"```\") {\n            let code = &content[pos..pos + fence_end];\n\n            result.push_str(\"<pre><code class=\\\"language-\");\n            result.push_str(&escape_html(lang));\n            result.push_str(\"\\\">\");\n            result.push_str(&escape_html(code));\n            result.push_str(\"</code></pre>\");\n\n            pos += fence_end + 3;\n\n            // Skip trailing newline\n            if pos < content.len() && content.as_bytes()[pos] == b'\\n' {\n                pos += 1;\n            }\n        } else {\n            // No closing fence, treat rest as text\n            result.push_str(\"<pre>\");\n            result.push_str(&escape_html(&content[pos..]));\n            result.push_str(\"</pre>\");\n            break;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Add remaining text\n    if pos < content.len() {\n        result.push_str(&escape_html(&content[pos..]));\n    }\n\n    result\n}\n\n/// Render content with code block detection for Markdown\nfn render_content_markdown(content: &str) -> String {\n    // For Markdown, we mostly preserve the original formatting\n    // Just ensure newlines are handled correctly\n    content.to_string()\n}\n\n/// Format duration between start and end\nfn format_duration(start: DateTime<Utc>, end: Option<DateTime<Utc>>) -> String {\n    let end = end.unwrap_or_else(Utc::now);\n    let duration = end.signed_duration_since(start);\n\n    let mut parts: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n\n    if duration.num_days() > 0 {\n        parts.push(format!(\"{}d\", duration.num_days()));\n    }\n    if duration.num_hours() % 24 > 0 {\n        parts.push(format!(\"{}h\", duration.num_hours() % 24));\n    }\n    if duration.num_minutes() % 60 > 0 {\n        parts.push(format!(\"{}m\", duration.num_minutes() % 60));\n    }\n\n    if parts.is_empty() {\n        \"<1m\".to_string()\n    } else {\n        parts.join(\" \")\n    }\n}\n\n/// Format model(s) used\nfn format_models(model: Option<&str>) -> String {\n    model.unwrap_or(\"unknown\").to_string()\n}\n\n/// Format timestamp for display\nfn format_timestamp(ts: &DateTime<Utc>) -> String {\n    ts.format(\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC\").to_string()\n}\n\n/// Get role badge label\nfn role_badge_label(role: &Role) -> &'static str {\n    match role {\n        Role::User => \"User\",\n        Role::Assistant => \"Assistant\",\n        Role::System => \"System\",\n        Role::ToolCall => \"Tool\",\n        Role::ToolResult => \"Result\",\n    }\n}\n\n/// Escape HTML special characters\nfn escape_html(s: &str) -> String {\n    let mut result = String::with_capacity(s.len());\n    for c in s.chars() {\n        match c {\n            '&' => result.push_str(\"&amp;\"),\n            '<' => result.push_str(\"&lt;\"),\n            '>' => result.push_str(\"&gt;\"),\n            '\"' => result.push_str(\"&quot;\"),\n            '\\'' => result.push_str(\"&#x27;\"),\n            c => result.push(c),\n        }\n    }\n    result\n}\n\n/// Inline CSS for HTML output (~3KB budget)\nconst CSS: &str = r#\"\n:root {\n  --bg: #ffffff;\n --tool-result-bg: #fce4ec;\n}\n\n@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {\n  :root {\n    --bg: #1a1a1a;\n    --fg: #e0e0e0;\n    --border: #333333;\n    --header-bg: #2d2d2d;\n    --code-bg: #252525;\n
